instruction: Help me record the store performance

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Store'
ws['B1'] = 'City'
ws['C1'] = 'Monthly Sales(10K CNY)'
ws['D1'] = 'Foot Traffic'
ws['A2'] = 'Chaoyang Store'
ws['B2'] = 'Beijing'
ws['C2'] = 85.2
ws['D2'] = 12500
ws['A3'] = 'Pudong Store'
ws['B3'] = 'Shanghai'
ws['C3'] = 92.1
ws['D3'] = 15200
ws['A4'] = 'Tianhe Store'
ws['B4'] = 'Guangzhou'
ws['C4'] = 78.5
ws['D4'] = 11800
ws['A5'] = 'Futian Store'
ws['B5'] = 'Shenzhen'
ws['C5'] = 88.9
ws['D5'] = 13600
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/store_data.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the store performance
Find the store with the highest monthly sales from /home/user/Desktop/store_data.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/store_report.txt: 'Top Sales Store: Pudong Store (Shanghai, 92.1)', save
